tasks.type: retrieving values | combining data | characterizing distributions
tasks.method: Combine data from `blinkit_customers`, `blinkit_orders`, and `blinkit_order_items` using `customer_id` and `order_id` as keys. Characterize distributions of `total_orders` and `avg_order_value` for each customer segment using a scatter plot. Points are color-coded by `customer_segment`, while tooltips display `total_orders`, `avg_order_value`, and `area`. (V3, I3).
tasks.objective: Understand how purchase frequency and order value vary across customer segments and identify patterns or correlations between these metrics.

tasks.type: retrieving values | aggregating | finding extrema | sorting
tasks.method: Aggregate `blinkit_order_items` by `product_id` to calculate purchase frequency and merge this data with corresponding product metadata (e.g., `category`, `brand`) from `blinkit_products`. Sort the data by frequency and visualize the top 10 products with a bar chart.
tasks.objective: Identify the most popular products and trends by category or brand, supporting inventory planning and marketing strategies.

tasks.type: retrieving values | computing derived values | clustering
tasks.method: Compute the co-occurrence of `product_id` pairs within the same `order_id` in `blinkit_order_items`. Use association rule mining to identify frequently purchased product combinations and visualize the top 10 pairs using a bar chart (V1). Include multi-select filtering for custom exploration. (I2).
tasks.objective: Discover and analyze common product pairings to optimize product placement, bundling strategies, and recommendations.

tasks.method: Calculate the basket size distribution (sum of `quantity` for each `order_id`). Stratify the distribution by `customer_segment` and visualize the results using box plots (V4), with drill-down functionality to explore specific basket compositions. (I5).
tasks.objective: Examine variations in basket sizes across customer segments and identify segment-specific buying patterns.

tasks.method: Group customers by `area` and calculate aggregated metrics such as purchase frequency and average `order_total`. Visualize this geographic distribution with a heat map (V2), with interactive filtering on `customer_segment` and `area`. (I1).
tasks.objective: Explore regional variations in buying behavior, aiding localized inventory management and marketing efforts.

tasks.method: Analyze trends in product purchase frequency over time by aggregating product-level data using `order_date`. Visualize these trends using a line chart (V5) with brush interaction to select time ranges and filter data across other visuals. (I4).
tasks.objective: Identify seasonality and time-dependent trends in product purchases for inventory and marketing planning.

tasks.method: Cluster customers into distinct groups using `total_orders`, `avg_order_value`, and `customer_segment`. Compare the clusters in terms of demographic and purchase behavior traits, and visualize them on a scatter plot with cluster assignments as the color encoding.
tasks.objective: Uncover natural groupings of customers to enhance segmentation and uncover trends in purchase behaviors.
